expected_behavior: A mid-length conversational episode (~30 min) with dense transcript atoms and no creator-supplied chapters. Lands squarely in the default-stub mid-band: atoms/50 = 4 → 4 inferred chapters. Demonstrates the gate can produce a non-trivial plan on a typical conversational show without saturating the upper clamp.
synthesis_notes: Synthetic. Atom density modeled on a fast-paced conversational show. No transcript text, no commercial-message attribution, no episode title.
